title: arctium lepidum
intro: Arctium lepidum, also known as Burdock, is a biennial plant in the daisy and sunflower family. It has been used for centuries for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Arctium lepidum include reducing fever, alleviating skin conditions such as acne, eczema, and psoriasis, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Arctium lepidum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, from digestive problems to skin conditions.
